ocr_findings.description: Section heading rendered as '09 システム監査の3つのポイント' in OCR — the '09' prefix does not appear in the image; the image shows a bullet icon (●●) followed by 'システム監査の３つのポイント'. Spurious '09' prefix inserted.
Callout box text: image reads '試験にはコレが出る！' but OCR outputs '試験にはつしが出る！' — 'コレ' is misread as 'つし', changing the meaning of the callout.
Mascot illustration (dog with magnifying glass) replaced with img-0.jpeg reference — expected for figures, no text lost.

reviewer_notes: Page covers システム監査の3つのポイント with a structured table (信頼性/安全性/効率性) and supplementary sidebar on 情報セキュリティ監査. Table rows are correctly captured. The two mid-severity errors (spurious heading prefix and コレ→つし misread) prevent a PASS but content is largely faithful.
